CONTENT.Club career: Marín made his debut for the Castilla side on 2 May 2021, coming on as a substitute in a 3–1 win over Badajoz. He would later be called up to the senior team for the first time on 22 December 2021, spending the entirety of the match on the bench in a 2–1 victory at Athletic Bilbao in La Liga.On 28 July 2023, Marín was sent to Alavés on a season long loan until 30 June 2024.On 10 July 2024, Marín signed for Serie A club Napoli on a 5 year contract.
CONTENT.External links: Real Madrid ProfileRafa Marín at BDFutbolRafa Marín at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)Rafa Marín at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Rafael Marín Zamora (born 19 May 2002) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Napoli. He has represented Spain in U17, U18 and U21 Levels.
